features: Original Source: We capture the intensity nature has to offer. Original Source is made with 100 Percent natural fragrances, we’re inspired by nature, from bold scents and vibrant colours, we've made it our mission to share fresh sensorial hits in every shower
The Power of Nature: 40 real limes and 100 Percent natural fragrance have been packed in every bottle of shower gel. Get a zing in your step with fruity fresh Original Source Zingy Lime shower gel.

100 Percent Vegan and Cruelty Free Original Source is proudly vegan and we carry the logo on all products. Products are tested on us, never on animals. This fragrance is created to offer a shower experience to stimulate the senses with an intense hit of nature
Paraben free: The zingy Lime shower wash has been consciously made without parabens
Shower gel mutlipack: Extend your daily dose of zinginess and nature with this 6 x 250 ml shower gel multipack
description: Product Description A shower gel multipack with 6 bottles bursting with a different and zingy fragrance. We've packed 40 real limes and 100 Percent natural fragrance into every bottle. Zingy limes are sourced from both Peru and Mexico. A balance of spicy Persian and aromatic key limes are then handpicked by farmers during the summer months ensuring that only the freshest limes are used in every bottle. A shower experience designed to put a zing in your step. Products are tested on us, never on animals, paraben free and we’re proud to be Vegan too. Original Source Shower Gel is manufactured in the UK using 100 Percent renewable energy and bottles are 100 Percent recyclable. Enjoy your daily shower time with a sensorial hit of nature. Ingredients vitamin-c Directions Use Within Recommended Period – Check jar symbol on package for months of use after opening. Safety Warning Be careful to avoid eyes, it's not for them it's for your body!
